---
title: inefficient-map-lookup
description: "Avoid repeated map lookups."
---

<!-- Code generated by docs/scripts/generate-lint-docs.go; DO NOT EDIT. -->

Avoid repeated map lookups. Strider default: enabled.

## Bad

```go
if _, ok := values[key]; ok { use(values[key]) }
```

## Good

```go
if value, ok := values[key]; ok { use(value) }
```

## Enable

This optional check runs when selected with `--only inefficient-map-lookup`, enabled in `strider.toml`, or included with `--all`. The default severity is `warning`.
